text: Good afternoon. This is Jacob. So I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Arkansas State Relief Program. So far, have you received any updates or notifications about this yet? Do you hear what I say? You don't see the chef department. Do you want?
